overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game featuring a hooded character exploring a rainy urban waterfront plaza and promenade, transitioning to Miles Morales walking through a busy city street with elevated train tracks. The clip showcases high-fidelity game engine graphics with wet reflective surfaces, overcast lighting, and detailed urban environments including bridge overpasses and waterfront views.

segments.scene_description: A hooded character walks through an empty urban plaza featuring a central tree planter, outdoor dining furniture, and wet concrete surfaces reflecting the overcast sky. The camera follows from behind as the character approaches the waterfront, passing between a large concrete pillar and brick buildings.

events.description: exits plaza onto waterfront walkway with river and city skyline visible
scene fades to black as character stands still

agents.ego_description: hooded figure walking along waterfront promenade, passing industrial debris and yellow barrels, stopping occasionally to look at city skyline

dense cluster of modern skyscrapers across the river including distinctive glass towers
massive steel and concrete bridge structure passing overhead with wooden pilings below
cluster of bright yellow industrial barrels and wooden crates
scattered broken wooden pallets and trash on wet pavement

segments.scene_description: The character emerges onto a narrow waterfront promenade with the river on the left and a massive bridge overhead. The walkway features yellow industrial barrels and scattered debris. The camera pans to reveal the city skyline across the water before the character continues under the bridge structure, eventually stopping as the scene fades to black.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with elevated train tracks and parked cars

events.description: abrupt cut to Miles Morales character on different city street
character raises hand to wave at approaching pedestrian

red brick buildings with storefronts at street level
mature trees with green foliage lining the sidewalk
commercial storefronts with signage including circular logo

segments.scene_description: The scene cuts to Miles Morales walking down a busy city sidewalk lined with parked cars and brick buildings. Elevated train tracks run overhead while pedestrians walk in both directions. Miles waves to a passing pedestrian as he continues down the street, passing storefronts and street trees.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a desolate urban plaza that gradually opens onto a rainy waterfront promenade. It begins behind a hooded character walking across wet concrete surfaces, passing by outdoor dining furniture and a central tree planter under an overcast sky. As the character moves between a large concrete pillar and brick buildings, the scene expands to reveal a narrow walkway lined with yellow industrial barrels and scattered debris. The camera then pans across the river to showcase the distant city skyline before the character continues forward under the massive structure of an overhead bridge, finally coming to a stop as the view fades to black.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement as Miles Morales navigates a bustling urban sidewalk beneath the shadow of elevated transit infrastructure. It begins with Miles walking past a row of parked cars and brick buildings, the camera tracking his steady progress through the city. As he moves forward, the scene opens up to reveal pedestrians flowing in both directions under the overhead train tracks. The movement continues past a series of storefronts and street trees, punctuated by a brief moment where Miles waves to a passing pedestrian before continuing his journey down the street.
